summary: Comprehensive end-to-end backend test suite for FootBallChat. 34/34 tests pass (100%) covering health, OTP auth (start/verify/rate-limit/cooldown/dev-fallback), super-test-login, /api/me GET+PATCH, groups CRUD, FREE plan limit, public marketplace + geo, preview-by-code (no auth), points_config validation, cash categories add/deactivate, members/guests, role change rules, OWNER protection, organizer-vs-organizer removal, and the guest-merge-on-/auth/join flow. Found and fixed 1 minor bug in OTP cooldown (datetime tz mismatch returning 500 instead of 429).

minor.issue: FIXED — tz-aware vs tz-naive datetime subtraction. MongoDB returns naive datetimes for created_at, but utc_now() is tz-aware, causing TypeError -> HTTP 500 instead of 429 on rapid 2nd OTP request. Patched routes/auth.py to coerce naive last_at to UTC before subtraction (mirrors the same pattern already used in deps.py for billing.period_end).

Indexes are created only at app startup. If the database is dropped while the backend is running (e.g. mongosh dropDatabase), the 2dsphere index on groups.location.point disappears and /api/groups/public returns 500 ('unable to find index for $geoNear query'). Recommend either creating indexes lazily on first use or documenting that DB drops require backend restart.

action_items: Verify that the cooldown patch in routes/auth.py (added `.replace(tzinfo=timezone.utc)` for naive last_at) is the correct fix and consider adding the same defensive coercion anywhere else where datetimes from Mongo are compared against utc_now() (audit done, this was the only spot missed).
Optional hardening: ensure 2dsphere indexes are created idempotently on first request or in a background watcher, so a wipe-without-restart does not break /api/groups/public.
critical_code_review_comments: GOOD: Every response uses 'id' instead of '_id' (verified). serialize_doc + _user_to_response wrappers handle conversion correctly.
GOOD: preview-by-code is declared BEFORE /{group_id} so FastAPI routing works as intended; verified with no-auth test.
GOOD: FREE plan single-OWNER-group limit enforced via count_owner_groups; second create returns 400 with localized message.
GOOD: Guest merge flow on /auth/join correctly removes guest doc and inserts membership for the new user.

MINOR: routes/groups.py update_group POPs forbidden fields after validation but not before model_dump — currently fine because Pydantic model doesn't include them, but worth keeping the defensive code.

MINOR: deactivate_category endpoint adds to inactive_categories but returns 404 only if category not in cash_categories. Calling DELETE twice is idempotent (no error second time because $addToSet) — acceptable behavior.
MINOR: /api/auth/join in dev mode (no Twilio) accepts any phone without OTP. This is documented dev behavior; ensure the production switch enforces OTP (verified by code path).
test_credentials: Super tester +359888999999 via POST /api/auth/super-test-login (no payload). Dev OTP 123456 accepted for any phone. Test users created during run: +359888100100 (OwnerTester), +359888666666 (Real User merged from guest), +359888888001 (Org2). JWT_SECRET in backend/.env is used directly by tests to mint tokens for impersonation tests.
seed_data_creation: Tests use mongosh dropDatabase() before run + insert seed docs (otp_codes for rate-limit, users for non-super-tester scenarios). Tests are idempotent within a single run as long as the DB is dropped at the start.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Suite expects backend running at REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL. Before each full run, drop DB and restart backend so 2dsphere indexes are recreated: `mongosh footballchat --eval 'db.dropDatabase()' && sudo supervisorctl restart backend && sleep 3 && pytest backend/tests/`. The suite uses pymongo to seed/wipe OTP records to bypass the 60s cooldown when needed. JWT_SECRET is read from backend/.env to mint tokens for the OwnerTester and Org2 users (no public endpoint exists to login an arbitrary phone without OTP+verify path that returns user_exists=False).
rca of the issue: Cooldown 500 bug RCA: routes/auth.py:_create_and_send_otp reads last otp_codes.created_at from Mongo. Motor/PyMongo returns BSON datetimes as naive (UTC-equivalent but no tzinfo). The code then performed (now - last_at) where now=utc_now() is tz-aware -> TypeError. Reproduction: POST /api/auth/start twice within 60s for same phone. Fix: after the existing string-coercion branch, also detect naive datetime and attach timezone.utc. Verified: test_resend_cooldown_60s now returns 429 with proper message.
